name: @practica/test-eyes-junit
description: JUnit XML collector for Test Eyes analytics dashboard

scripts.build:bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:fs --external:fs/promises --external:path --external:child_process --external:util && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/cli.js --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --external:fs --external:fs/promises --external:path --external:child_process --external:util && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
